title: Carl!
body: He is in the coffee shop with me

title: Shadow of the Erdtree DLC is a masterpiece
body: The level design in the DLC might be FromSoft's best work. The Scadutree is absolutely massive and every corner has something new to discover.

title: Best Elden Ring build for beginners?
body: Starting my first playthrough — should I go strength or dex? Heard bleed builds are broken but I want the authentic experience.

title: The new Dust 2 rework is controversial
body: They moved B site again and added a new connector from mid. Some pros love it but the casual community is divided.

title: Just beat Ornstein and Smough for the first time
body: After 47 attempts I finally did it solo. Killed Ornstein first to get Smough's hammer. This game really is the GOAT. My hands are shaking.

title: BG3 Patch 8 adds 12 new subclasses
body: Larian just dropped a massive patch — Barbarian gets Path of the Giant, Bard gets College of Dance. This game keeps getting better months after release.

title: Unpopular opinion: Karlach is overrated
body: Don't get me wrong she's great but Shadowheart's character arc is way more compelling. The Shar/Selune conflict hits different.

title: GTA VI trailer 2 breakdown: everything we spotted
body: Vice City looks insane in the new engine. The water physics alone are next gen. Also spotted what looks like a heist mission in the marina district.

title: Will GTA VI have crossplay?
body: Rockstar hasn't confirmed but with the dual protagonist system it would be perfect for co-op. Anyone hear rumors about this?

title: Monster Hunter Wilds beta impressions
body: The seamless zone transitions are a game changer. No more loading screens between areas. Combat feels snappier than World too.

title: New weapon type leaked for Wilds?
body: DataMiners found references to a "Tempest Blade" in the latest build. Could be the first new weapon class since Iceborne.

title: CS2 Major Copenhagen results are wild
body: FaZe vs Navi grand finals went to triple overtime on Inferno. This might be the best Major we've ever had. Esports is back.

title: Cyberpunk sequel reportedly in full production
body: CDPR Bostonis apparently scaling up fast. Rumor is it's set in a new city — possibly based on San Francisco. Unreal Engine 5 this time.

title: Best Cyberpunk 2077 builds after 2.1 patch
body: Netrunner is still OP but the new Sandevistan tech tree makes melee builds actually viable. Mantis blades + slow-mo = chef's kiss.

title: Minecraft 1.22 adds the Pale Garden biome
body: The creaking mob is terrifying — it only moves when you're not looking at it. Very Weeping Angels energy. The pale oak wood looks amazing for builds.

title: Crimson Desert gameplay deep dive — this could be GOTY
body: Pearl Abyss showed 40 minutes of uncut gameplay. The combat looks like a mix of Dragon's Dogma and Black Desert. Open world scale is massive.

title: Crimson Desert vs Elden Ring Nightreign — which are you more hyped for?
body: Both dropping close together. CD looks more story-driven while Nightreign is co-op focused. I think CD takes it for solo players.

title: Doom: The Dark Ages review scores are in — 92 on Metacritic
body: id Software has done it again. Medieval Doom sounds weird on paper but the dragon riding sections are apparently incredible.

title: RDR2 PC mods that completely transform the game
body: The photorealistic reshade + 4K texture pack makes this game look like it came out in 2025. Arthur's model with HD hair physics is wild.

title: PoE2 endgame is already deeper than most ARPGs
body: The atlas rework in early access is insane. Each map has unique mechanics now and the boss encounters are Souls-level challenging.

title: Testing!
body: What does this post do?

title: GTA VI trailer breakdown — every detail you missed
body: The Miami skyline in the background confirms the map is HUGE. Look at the reflections on the water. Rockstar does not miss.

title: Elden Ring DLC boss tier list — do you agree?
body: Messmer at S-tier is not even debatable. But putting Bayle above Midra? Controversial take incoming...

title: Crimson Desert combat looks absolutely INSANE
body: The devs confirmed full seamless open world with no loading screens. This is giving me Elden Ring vibes but with better animations.

title: BG3 modding scene is getting out of hand
body: Someone modded in a full romance questline with Withers. The community is unhinged and I love it.

title: Black Myth Wukong DLC leaked screenshots
body: New areas look incredible. The lighting engine in this game is next-gen. FromSoft needs to take notes.

title: DOOM: The Dark Ages hands-on preview is WILD
body: Medieval DOOM with a dragon mount and shield-based combat. id Software keeps pushing the genre forward.

title: Ghost of Yōtei — female samurai protagonist confirmed
body: Sucker Punch going with a new protagonist and setting. The snowy landscapes look absolutely gorgeous.

title: Elden Ring Nightreign co-op gameplay looks amazing
body: Roguelite + Soulsborne + 3-player co-op. FromSoft is about to print money again. Day one buy for me.

title: Half-Life 3 announcement reaction thread
body: ITS ACTUALLY HAPPENING. After 20 years. I cannot believe Valve actually did it. Source 3 engine confirmed.
